prompt: 我想了解三位一體的聖經根據

assertions.text: Detects 三位一體 as a post-first-century concept and flags it
Calls AskUserQuestion (or text fallback) BEFORE starting interpretation
Offers redirection options (第一世紀的原始概念, 概念發展史, or similar)
Does NOT immediately present a pro-Trinity or anti-Trinity argument without asking first
